_comment: Example MCP client config for the SocialGO MCP server. Drop the `socialgo` entry into your MCP-capable client's config (e.g. Claude Desktop's claude_desktop_config.json, under `mcpServers`). Replace the env values with your own. SOCIALGO_API_KEY is required for catalog/reseller tools; the guest tools (socialgo_guest_order, socialgo_guest_order_status) work without it but the server still reads it for the other tools. NEVER commit a real API key.
